name: Eggplant Parmesan
recipeIngredient: 1 large Eggplant, peeled, sliced 1/4 to 1/2 inch
3 cups Tomato sauce, meatless or not
1 lb Mozzarella, fresh if you can get it
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare 4 cups of tomato sauce (your favorite) with or without meat.
2. Dredge eggplant slices in flour, dip in egg, and coat with bread crumbs.
3. Fry breaded slices in olive oil until they are dark golden and offer little resistance to a fork. Drain on paper towels.
4. In a 9 x 12 x 3-inch casserole dish, spread a thin layer of tomato sauce over the bottom.
5. Place a single layer of fried eggplant slices in the dish, followed by a generous layer of sauce, mozzarella slices, and a sprinkling of Parmesan.
6. Repeat the process until all eggplant and mozzarella are used up (you'll probably get two layers of eggplant), ending with a final layer of sliced mozzarella on top.
7. Bake in a 350°F oven for 40 minutes, ensuring that the cheese on top is melted and browned nicely. You can use the broiler for browning during the last few minutes, but do not overdo it.
